footer_controls: WASD/Arrows: move  |  Left/Right: change  |  Q/E or Tab: category  |  R: default  |  Enter: confirm  |  Esc/F8: close  |  Shift/Ctrl: faster steps
experimental_note: Uses heuristics or is reserved for future hooks. Safe to save, but results may vary by enemy, boss, or scene.
desc_damage: Sets Hornet's base attack damage. Normal upgrades still add their usual bonus on top.
desc_health: Sets Hornet's base maximum health. Permanent health upgrades remain preserved on top of this base.
desc_drop: Global multiplier for currency and stackable item drops.
desc_damage_taken: Global fallback multiplier for incoming damage.
desc_healing_multiplier: Multiplies how much health each heal restores.
desc_healing_cost_multiplier: Multiplies the silk cost used for healing.
desc_invincibility_time_multiplier: Scales post-hit invulnerability frames and recovery safety window.
desc_skill_damage_multiplier: Multiplies damage from non-basic skill attacks detected through current combat hooks.
desc_silk_spear_damage_multiplier: Separate multiplier for silk spear style attacks detected by weapon/tool heuristics.
desc_boss_damage_multiplier: Multiplies Hornet's damage dealt to boss targets.
desc_common_enemy_damage_multiplier: Multiplies Hornet's damage dealt to non-boss enemies.
desc_critical_chance: Chance for outgoing damage to become a critical hit.
desc_critical_damage_multiplier: Damage multiplier applied when a critical hit happens.
desc_environmental_damage_multiplier: Scales spikes, acid, traps, and similar hazard damage when detected safely.
desc_boss_damage_taken_multiplier: Extra multiplier for damage received from boss sources.
desc_common_enemy_damage_taken_multiplie: Extra multiplier for damage received from common enemies.
desc_enemy_health_multiplier: Simulates enemy health scaling by adjusting how much damage common enemies effectively take.
desc_enemy_damage_multiplier: Extra multiplier applied to damage from common enemies.
desc_enemy_speed_multiplier: Experimental. Reserved for future enemy movement hooks and may not affect current gameplay yet.
desc_enemy_attack_cooldown_multiplier: Experimental. Reserved for future enemy attack timing hooks.
desc_enemy_aggression_multiplier: Experimental. Reserved for future AI aggression and detection range hooks.
desc_boss_health_multiplier: Simulates boss health scaling by adjusting how much damage boss targets effectively take.
desc_boss_damage_taken_multiplier: Extra multiplier for damage Hornet receives from bosses.
desc_boss_speed_multiplier: Experimental. Reserved for future boss speed hooks.
desc_boss_attack_cooldown_multiplier: Experimental. Reserved for future boss attack timing hooks.
desc_boss_brutal_mode: Enables an extra boss challenge layer with harsher healing and damage rules.
desc_disable_healing_during_boss: When enabled, healing returns zero health during boss fights.
desc_healing_during_boss_multiplier: Additional heal multiplier applied only while fighting bosses.
desc_currency_drop_multiplier: Extra multiplier for currency drops after the global drop rate is applied.
desc_item_drop_multiplier: Extra multiplier for stackable item drops after the global drop rate is applied.
desc_shop_price_multiplier: Experimental. Stored safely now and reserved for future shop hook support.
desc_boss_reward_multiplier: Experimental. Stored safely now and reserved for future boss reward hook support.
desc_death_currency_loss_multiplier: Experimental. Stored safely now and reserved for future death-loss hook support.
desc_player_speed_multiplier: Scales Hornet's run and walk speed at runtime.
desc_jump_height_multiplier: Scales jump force and minimum jump speed at runtime.
desc_dash_cooldown_multiplier: Scales dash cooldown timing, including harpoon dash recovery.
desc_ability_cost_multiplier: Multiplies general ability costs used by current silk skill hooks.
desc_one_hit_mode: Any incoming hit is scaled to remove all remaining health.
desc_menu_language: Changes only this mod menu language. Non-Brazilian Portuguese options are marked as AI-made and may fall back to English where no dedicated file exists yet.
desc_apply: Saves the current draft and applies it immediately.
desc_reset: Restores every setting to default values and applies them immediately.
desc_discard: Throws away the current draft and reloads the last applied values.
desc_back: Closes the menu. Unsaved draft changes are discarded.
desc_preset_easy: A lighter preset with more health, more damage, better healing, and better drops.
desc_preset_hard: A tougher preset with less health, stronger enemies, stronger bosses, and reduced drops.
desc_preset_nightmare: A punishing preset with reduced healing, high incoming damage, and expensive economy.
desc_preset_one_hit: A one-hit challenge preset with minimal health and no real healing safety net.
desc_preset_farm: A farming preset focused on safety, mobility, and extra rewards.
desc_preset_custom: Keeps whatever values you tune manually.
